html:
Exclusive to:

“Use on Garden Soil to create dirt piles where survivors can plant seeds.”

-

The Splendid Garden Hoe is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted at an Alchemy Engine with four Twigs and 2 Gold Nuggets. The Splendid Garden Hoe is used to move or destroy Farm Soil when used on a Farm Soil Turf. It has 100 uses.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Splendid Garden Hoe
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of an expensive garden hoe.
Woven - Elegant
Cottage Collection
Beespoke Garden Hoe
It would be a shame to get dirt on this beautifully crafted garden hoe.

Trivia

  • The Garden Hoe and the Splendid Garden Hoe were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
  • On release the Splendid Garden Hoe was originally named the Luxury Hoe.

Assets

  • Beespoke Garden Hoe Dropped.
  • Beespoke Garden Hoe Equipped.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

plainText:
Splendid Garden Hoe
"Elegantly till soil for crop seeds."
Combat
17
Object Info
Perk
Till Farm Soil.
Equipable
100 uses (Tilling)
Does not stack
Crafting
×4 ×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
golden_farm_hoe
Exclusive to:
“Do I really need something this fancy to move dirt around?”
–Wilson
“It won't help fires grow, but at least it's shiny.”
–Willow
“Fancy garden hoe good for planting seeds!”
–Wolfgang
“One might as well garden in style.”
–Wendy
“GOLD IS *MORE* DURABLE?”
–WX-78
“The most malleable of metals, but let's see how it does in the garden.”
–Wickerbottom
“Now that I've made it, might as well put it to good use.”
–Woodie
“A bit extravagant, don't you think?”
–Maxwell
“A tööl far töö magnificent för thöse wörthless seeds.”
–Wigfrid
“Gardening's more fun when you get to play with something shiny!”
–Webber
“Good tools do make a difference.”
–Warly
“Pretty dirt mover”
–Wormwood
“Awfully ritzy for yard work.”
–Winona
“How splendidly excessive! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Fancy digger for baby plants, florp.”
–Wurt
“My tilling skils deserve a gold metal! Get it?”
–Walter
“Why can't the dirt just move itself?”
–Wanda
“Use on Garden Soil to create dirt piles where survivors can plant seeds.”
-
The Splendid Garden Hoe is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted at an Alchemy Engine with four Twigs and 2 Gold Nuggets.
The Splendid Garden Hoe is used to move or destroy Farm Soil when used on a Farm Soil Turf. It has 100 uses.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Garden Hoe and the Splendid Garden Hoe were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
On release the Splendid Garden Hoe was originally named the Luxury Hoe.

Get it? |wanda = Why can't the dirt just move itself? |choose = walter}}{{Scrapbook Info|Use on Garden Soil to create dirt piles where survivors can plant seeds.}} The '''Splendid Garden Hoe''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''.
